twitter_thread: 70% of Anthropic Models in Office apps are being replaced by Microsoft. 30k hours of retraining data are being used to fill the gap.
Anthropic's training data lacks 12 specific enterprise features that Microsoft is now prioritizing.
Microsoft's API framework has 400 custom integrations to replace Anthropic Models, a 5x increase from last year.
Don't assume Anthropic Models can replace Microsoft's own models: 25% of features won't translate.
Microsoft is retraining models on 50k proprietary datasets to improve accuracy by 18%.
Anthropic must now compete with Microsoft's AI team, which has grown 300% in the last 2 years.
What's your experience with Anthropic Models in Office apps? Are you noticing the 22% drop in errors? #aitechnology #anthropicmodels
